mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE create_time >= #{since}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_account WHERE status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_account SET mute_until = #{muteUntil}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_account SET role = #{role}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE community_post SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE community_post SET is_pinned = #{pinned}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE community_post SET is_featured = #{featured}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_comment c LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = c.author_id
AND (c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
